criteria.description: All first-party composer.json files require >=8.5 (or ^8.5 where caret form was already in use); 3 metapackages (cms, core, full) have no php key by design.
criteria.evidence: 66 packages bumped in commit 1030f57bf; verified via grep -r '"php":' packages/*/composer.json. Metapackages packages/cms, packages/core, packages/full intentionally omit php key per CP006.

criteria.description: All GitHub Actions workflows (ci.yml, skeleton-smoke.yml, release.yml) set php-version: '8.5' with no leftover 8.4 jobs.
criteria.evidence: 10 occurrences of php-version: '8.5' across 3 workflow files in commit 1030f57bf; rg -n 'php-version:' .github/workflows/ shows zero 8.4 references.
skeleton/Dockerfile bumped to FROM php:8.5-fpm-alpine in commit 1030f57bf.

criteria.description: Zero PHP 8.5 deprecation notices in first-party code; each category cleared with appropriate fix or suppression.
criteria.evidence: vendor/bin/phpunit --display-deprecations: 7497 tests, 18118 assertions, Deprecations: 0. Three categories cleared in commits c9a6c1988 + 8be1d52a2: (1) Reflection::setAccessible() removed at 22 sites; (2) $http_response_header replaced with http_get_last_response_headers() in StreamHttpClient.php; (3) FailedJobRepositoryTest annotated with #[IgnoreDeprecations] for the still-shipped deprecated class.
criteria.notes: Original audit predicted regression tests per fix; not added because the fixes are deletions/replacements with no new behavior to test — existing test coverage exercises the affected paths and would have surfaced regressions.

criteria.description: #[\NoDiscard] applied to AccessResult, query-builder fluent methods, and EntityRepository::find*(); surfaced ignored-return call sites are fixed, not suppressed.
criteria.evidence: Commit 853849c25 applies NoDiscard to AccessResult::{allowed,forbidden,neutral,unauthenticated}, EntityRepositoryInterface::{find,findMany,findBy,loadRevision,rollback}, and DBALSelect fluent methods (10 methods). 16 call sites updated to capture mutating-fluent return values across SqlStorageDriver, SqlEntityQuery, SqlEntityStorage, DBALSelectTest. ValidationResult target skipped — class does not exist; package delegates to Symfony ConstraintViolationList.
criteria.notes: ValidationResult skip rationale documented in commit message and CHANGELOG entry.

criteria.description: PHP 8.4/8.5 ergonomic features adopted at clear-win sites: array_first/array_last, array_find, pipe operator.
criteria.evidence: Commit e65faf132 adopts array_find at 2 clear-win sites (SearchResult::getFacet, CliTester::findOption). array_first/array_last skipped — surveyed 5 reset() sites, all reject because surrounding type contracts (load() accepts int|string, not null) require an explicit empty guard either way. Pipe operator skipped — no clear-win sites; the most idiomatic candidates were already two-step expressions.
criteria.notes: Conservative interpretation of 'where they improve readability' — opportunistic, not exhaustive.

criteria.description: .php-cs-fixer.dist.php includes @PHP8x5Migration; lazy-init closures converted to const where applicable.
criteria.evidence: Commit f048604aa adds @PHP8x5Migration ruleset (cs-fixer 3.95+ canonical name; @PHP85Migration deprecated). 102 files touched: 52× octal_notation (0o prefix), 58× new_expression_parentheses (chained-new), 8× heredoc_indentation. closures-in-const skipped — surveyed all static methods, 0 candidates qualified (no first-class-callable patterns where the static method exists only as a Foo::method(...) reference).
criteria.notes: Closures-in-const skip rationale documented in commit message.

criteria.description: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] includes a bullet describing the bump and adopted features. README, CLAUDE.md, charter, and docs/specs/* reference PHP 8.5 throughout.
criteria.evidence: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] > ### Changed contains the 'PHP 8.5 baseline upgrade' bullet (commit 9b69f7874). README.md, CLAUDE.md prose updated to 8.5+ in commit ac9c5afb6. docs/specs/access-control.md, entity-system.md, infrastructure.md, api-layer.md, debugging-dx.md, mcp-endpoint.md carry 'Spec reviewed 2026-05-10' WP02/WP03/WP05 stamps.

Pre-push hook (lefthook) runs spec-drift, composer-policy, phpstan, phpunit on every push during the lane — all green on the latest commit 9b69f7874. PHPStan: 1193 files, 0 errors. PHPUnit: 7497 tests, 18118 assertions, 0 failures, 2 expected skips, 0 deprecations.
criteria.notes: bin/audit-dead-code and bin/audit-require-dev-layers are warn-only and not part of the hard-gate matrix; left unverified in this acceptance pass.

criteria.description: Quality gate: composer cs-check (PHP-CS-Fixer dry-run) clean.
criteria.evidence: composer cs-check after commit f048604aa applied the @PHP8x5Migration ruleset — files array empty.

criteria.description: Quality gate: composer phpstan (level 5, 1193 files) clean.
criteria.evidence: Pre-push hook on commit 9b69f7874: 1193/1193, [OK] No errors.

criteria.description: Quality gate: full vendor/bin/phpunit suite passes with zero deprecations.
criteria.evidence: Tests: 7497, Assertions: 18118, PHPUnit Warnings: 1 (no code coverage driver — pre-existing, unrelated), Deprecations: 0, Skipped: 2 (pre-existing).
bin/check-package-layers green throughout the lane; no upward dependency edges introduced.
bin/check-composer-policy green on commit 9b69f7874. CP002 (@dev forbidden), CP003 (no wildcard internal constraints), CP006 (self.version only at root) all satisfied.

criteria.description: Quality gate: tools/drift-detector.sh reports no stale specs against the merged commits.
criteria.evidence: Pre-push hook spec-drift green on commit 9b69f7874. Specs updated for StreamHttpClient (infrastructure.md), AccessResult/EntityRepositoryInterface (access-control.md, entity-system.md), and the WP05 cs-fixer pass (api-layer.md, debugging-dx.md, mcp-endpoint.md).

negative_invariants.description: No @phpstan-ignore, @var inline assertions, or type casts introduced to silence #[\NoDiscard] warnings. All warnings fixed by capturing return values or actually using them.
negative_invariants.evidence: Diff scan shows no new ignore-pragmas or void casts in the WP03 fix-up commit (853849c25). All 16 call-site fixes are reassignment ($query = $query->method(...)).

negative_invariants.description: Three metapackages (cms, core, full) remain free of an explicit php key per CP006 (self.version + sibling shape).
negative_invariants.evidence: All three metapackages still rely on transitive constraint via siblings.

negative_invariants.description: DBALSelect fluent methods remain mutating-and-return-self; #[\NoDiscard] did not introduce immutable-rebuild semantics.
negative_invariants.evidence: All marked methods still terminate with return $this; (lines 51, 66, 99, 117, 125, 138, 146, 154 verified during WP03 review).
